channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How the slash-and-burn tactics Musk brought to Washington backfired at Twitter
item.description: When Elon Musk bought Twitter in 2022, he laid off thousands of employees, stopped paying rent and auctioned off coffee makers and office chairs in hopes of a big turnaround.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BERNARD CONDON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Amazon to pay nearly $4M to settle lawsuit alleging it took tips from drivers
item.description: Amazon has agreed to pay nearly $4 million to settle charges that the e-commerce company subsidized its labor costs by taking tips its delivery drivers received from customers, District of Columbia Attorney General Brian L. Schwalb said Friday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Elon Musk team’s access to student loan systems raises alarms over personal information for millions
item.description: A lawsuit filed seeks to block DOGE’s access to student financial aid systems, saying it violates privacy rights of millions of federal student loan borrowers. It was filed by the advocacy group Student Defense on behalf of the University of California Student Association.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: SVG files are offering cybercriminals an easy way in with new phishing attacks
item.description: Scalable vector graphics can render hyperlinks in browsers, drawing victims closer to getting their credentials stolen.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Some RTX 5090 and 5080 GPUs have seriously inflated price tags, climbing as high as 70% over MSRP in the case of one Asus model
item.description: I don’t think any RTX 5090 is worth 70% more than MSRP, but that’s what you’ll pay for the priciest flagship Nvidia GPU.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Honeywell se transforma a partir de la IA generativa
item.description: Tras haber pasado años transformándose en una empresa totalmente basada en datos, el conglomerado estadounidense Honeywell está ahora preparado para aprovechar la inteligencia artificial (IA) generativa en todas las facetas de su negocio para impulsar la mejora de la productividad, la colaboración y
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Full-stack JavaScript leads the way
item.description: Building web apps begins with a simple premise, but the real-world experience is a juggling act of optimizations, best practices, toolchains, and so on. Developers tend to respond by doing what we do best: creating new tools and techniques to manage ever-changing demands.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OpenAI looks across US for sites to build its Trump-backed Stargate AI data centers
item.description: OpenAI is scouring the U.S. for sites to build a network of huge data centers to power its artificial intelligence technology, expanding beyond a flagship Texas location and looking across 16 states to accelerate the Stargate project championed by President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Apple's iPhone SE 4 might arrive as soon as next week, according to a new report
item.description: A new report from Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman notes that Apple could announce the iPhone SE 4 as soon as next week.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Nebraska government system shutdown disrupts the Legislature, DMV and other offices
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — A systemwide outage of state goverment computers shut down everything from the work of the Legislature to driver’s licensing offices for several hours Thursday.
item.dc:creator: MARGERY A. BECK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Contract intelligence comes to PDF
item.description: According to a new Adobe Acrobat survey, 89% of knowledge workers encounter contracts on the job, with more than half (52%) saying they work with contracts at least weekly.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: House lawmakers push to ban AI app DeepSeek from US government devices
item.description: Lawmakers in the House are proposing to ban the Chinese artificial intelligence app DeepSeek from U.S. government devices.
item.dc:creator: Matt Brown, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Hillary Clinton, Duffy tangle over DOGE involvement in Transportation Department
item.description: Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton and Department of Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy exchanged criticisms online Wednesday over the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) working with various federal agencies.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Lawmakers warn hiring freeze could thwart cyber workforce efforts
item.description: A former White House official who led cyber and tech recruiting efforts said the hiring freeze "will set us back months if not years." The post Lawmakers warn hiring freeze could thwart cyber workforce efforts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Legislators demand truth about OPM email server
item.description: Two members of the US House of Representatives want answers from the US Office of Personnel Management (OPM) over allegations that a “server of unknown nature” was used last month to “access sensitive government data without regard for crucial security and privacy protections.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to bring Google’s custom vibration brilliance to any Android phone today
item.description: Have you heard the buzz? Good vibrations are on their way to Android — or at least to Google’s own homemade Pixel devices.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple lashes out at iPhone porn app maker and the EU rules allowing its download
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple has chided a newly introduced pornography app available in the European Union, warning that the bloc’s digital rules opening the way for third-party app store downloads undermines consumer confidence in the tech giant.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Google's rising holiday's season ad sales aren't enough to ease worries about AI letdown
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google's digital ad sales continued to grow at a healthy clip during the holiday season, but that wasn't enough to offset investors' worries about whether its big bet on artificial intelligence will be lucrative as once envisioned.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Navy PEO Digital’s goals riding on Flank Speed’s success
item.description: Louis Koplin, the acting program executive officer for the Navy’s PEO-Digital, said priorities for 2025 include cyber resiliency and expanding BYOD. The post Navy PEO Digital’s goals riding on Flank Speed’s success first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: DHS research in airport passenger screening never stops
item.description: "We use millimeter technology to collect images of passengers to ensure that no threats that are not allowed on the plane," said John Fortune The post DHS research in airport passenger screening never stops first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Not seeing ROI from your AI? Observability may be the missing link
item.description: From chatbots, to coding copilots, to AI agents, generative AI-powered apps are seeing increased traction among enterprises. As they go mainstream, however, their shortcomings are becoming more clear and problematic.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google makes its appeal to overturn jury verdict branding the Play Store as illegal monopoly
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google went to appeals court Monday in an attempt to convince a three-judge panel to overturn a jury's verdict declaring its app store for Android smartphones as an illegal monopoly and block the penalties imposed by a federal judge to stop the misbehavior.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Canada's most populous province to pause retaliatory measures as US puts tariffs on hold
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — The leader of Ontario, Canada’s most populous province, said Monday he will pause all retaliatory measures against the United States after news broke that the threat of tariffs has been put on hold for a month.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Taiwan chip tariff would raise industry costs, analysts say
item.description: President Donald Trump continues to use tariffs like a club to get his way, and is threatening to place tariffs on computer chips made in Taiwan, warning the additional charges could reach as high as 100%.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: VMware by Broadcom: Product, service and support news
item.description: News of Broadcom’s plans to acquire VMware triggered concerns among customers, partners, and industry watchers, many of whom recalled Broadcom’s track record with prior high-profile acquisitions, including network switching vendor Brocade in 2016 for almost $6 billion, software firm CA Technologies
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates explores the making of his internal operating system in new memoir
item.description: As he prepares to turn 70 later this year, Microsoft founder Bill Gates' new memoir explores how his childhood quirks, upbringing, friendships and experiences coalesced into shaping his internal operating system.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Most talked-about Super Bowl ads
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says Super Bowl 2025 ads promise star power and laughs, featuring Beckham's twin reveal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Wheeled wonder robot dog shows off crazy dance moves in all kinds of tough terrain
item.description: Lynx the robot dog from China is pushing boundaries of what autonomous mobile robots can achieve with a groundbreaking design and unique mobility.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
